# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project is maintained as a portfolio project. Security fixes will be applied to the latest version when possible.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please report it privately by opening a GitHub Security Advisory or contact:

Email: 2023506074@student.annauniv.edu

Please do not disclose security vulnerabilities publicly until they have been reviewed.

Thank you for helping improve this project.
